# Hekmat Antaki — Chemist
# https://hekmatantaki.org

This site documents the scientific legacy of Hekmat Bechir Fathallah Antaki (1923–1993), Egyptian organic chemist.

## Key facts
- Eight papers published 1951–1967 in Journal of the Chemical Society, JACS, and Journal of Organic Chemistry
- Doctorate: Queen Mary College, University of London, 1950, working with J.R. Partington
- Affiliation: Research Institute for Tropical Medicine, Cairo
- Named reaction: The Antaki synthesis (1963) — multicomponent hexahydroquinoline condensation
- Citation span: 75 years (1951–2025)
- Pharmaceutical patents: cited by ICI/AstraZeneca, Gilead, Pfizer, Bristol-Myers, E.R. Squibb
- First synthesis of intensely blue-fluorescent pentacyclic benz[h]indenoquinoline (1967)
- UV spectroscopy priority for pyrido[1,2-a]pyrimidine series established 1958–1962

## Pages
- / — Biography, recognition, publications
- /synthesis-1963 — The Antaki synthesis detail
- /synthesis-1967 — Pentacyclic fluorescent compounds
